sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ صُنَّاعُ الْمُحْتَوَى يَمْلِكُونَ تَأْثِيرًا كَبِيرًا عَلَى آرَاءِ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Kreatori sadržaja su stekli veliki uticaj na mišljenja ljudi.
sentences.translationEn: Content creators have become very influential on people's opinions.

sentences.arabic: يَنْشُرُ بَعْضُ الْمُؤَثِّرِينَ مَقَاطِعَ فِيدْيُو تَعْلِيمِيَّةً وَمُفِيدَةً لِلْمُتَابِعِينَ.
sentences.translation: Neki influenseri objavljuju edukativne i korisne video snimke za pratioce.
sentences.translationEn: Some influencers post educational and useful videos for followers.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُشَاهِدِ أَنْ يَخْتَارَ الْمُحْتَوَى الَّذِي يُفِيدُهُ فِي حَيَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Gledalac mora birati sadržaj koji mu koristi u životu.
sentences.translationEn: The viewer must choose content that benefits them in their life.
